MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-608149 WITH CASE CGC-22-601471
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. HEIDI ADAMS, Esq. of Armijo, Morovati & Shields (tel: 415-273-6500) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ALLIANCE GROUND INTERNATIONAL, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-608149 WITH CASE CGC-22-601471.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's stipulated "motion to consolidate related actions" CGC-22-601471 and CGC-23-608149 is granted; the former shall be the lead action.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
